title: UK Launches Electronic Travel Authorization for Gulf Nationals
excerpt: The United Kingdom has expanded its Electronic Travel Authorization scheme to include citizens of Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain, and Saudi Arabia.

title: Schengen Area to Launch Digital Visa Platform by End of 2026
excerpt: The European Union has announced plans to launch a unified digital visa platform allowing travelers to apply for Schengen visas online.

title: India Extends e-Visa Validity to 5 Years for US and UK Citizens
excerpt: India has announced extended e-Visa validity for citizens of the United States and United Kingdom, allowing longer stays for tourism and business.

title: UAE Introduces 5-Year Multiple Entry Tourist Visa
excerpt: The UAE has launched a new five-year multiple-entry tourist visa system aimed at boosting tourism and business travel.

title: Japan Relaxes Visa Requirements for Southeast Asian Nationals
excerpt: Japan has eased visa requirements for citizens of several Southeast Asian countries to encourage tourism and business exchanges.

title: Australia Introduces Simplified Business Visitor Visa Stream
excerpt: Australia has launched a new streamlined business visitor visa stream with reduced documentation and faster processing times.

title: Brazil and China Sign Visa Waiver Agreement for Business Travelers
excerpt: Brazil and China have entered into a reciprocal visa waiver agreement for business travelers holding diplomatic and official passports.

title: Turkey Reports Record e-Visa Applications in Q2 2026
excerpt: Turkey has reported a significant surge in e-Visa applications during the second quarter of 2026, driven by increased tourism and business travel.
